# deviceBrowser(_:didAdd:moreComing:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the delegate that a device has been added.

## Declaration

```swift
func deviceBrowser(_ browser: ICDeviceBrowser, didAdd device: ICDevice, moreComing: Bool)
```

## Discussion

If several devices are found during the initial search, then this message is sent once for each device with the value of `moreComing` set to `true` in each message except the last one.

Not all devices are reported using this method. Devices that fail to communicate successfully are silently ignored.

## Adding and Removing Devices

- **deviceBrowser(_:didRemove:moreGoing:)**: Tells the delegate that a device has been removed.
- **deviceBrowserDidEnumerateLocalDevices(_:)**: Tells the delegate that the device browser has completed sending [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceBrowserDelegate/deviceBrowser(_:didAdd:moreComing:)] for all local devices.
